commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1ae7ec57891d6cbcec89bbc6e406f6ac0ce422f8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `env` map to the OpenShell plugin config, manifest, tests, and docs, then appends each entry as `--env KEY=VALUE` during `openshell sandbox create`.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +14, Docs +27. Total +65 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect from source: OpenShell rejects invalid or reserved env keys, while this PR accepts any string key and passes it directly to `--env`. I did not run a live OpenShell command because the CLI is not installed in this checkout.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the new config surface; automation should not repair this PR while the proof gate is mock-only.

target.title: feat(openshell): add non-secret env config for sandbox creation
target.author: wm0018

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
